content: iCloud Drive + Obsidian: .icloud placeholder files confuse Obsidian reads. Files not downloaded locally cause errors when Obsidian tries to read. Sync conflicts when two devices edit same file simultaneously causing data loss (forum thread). Obsidian cache file format causes conflicts with cloud syncing (forum#990). Some changes may not produce fs.watch events meaning Obsidian doesn't detect updates. Fix: enable Keep Downloaded on vault folder, keep vault in standard iCloud Drive location. Carlo Zottmann deep dive documents consistent sync problems. mnott/Obsidian-iCloud GitHub tool works around placeholder issues.
